instruction: Rewrite the CVE description in professional cybersecurity language.
input: The Chaty WordPress plugin before 2.8.3 and Chaty Pro WordPress plugin before 2.8.2 do not sanitise and escape the search parameter before outputting it back in the admin dashboard, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
output: The Chaty WordPress plugin versions earlier than 2.8.3 and Chaty Pro versions earlier than 2.8.2 fail to properly sanitize and escape the 'search' parameter before returning it to the admin dashboard, resulting in a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability.
